sessions.intent: Rule on coder's module-owns-action note: action.Module string -> module.@this element, Create-everywhere construction chain

before.assumptions: action.Module is a naked string re-resolved at dispatch; module element already owns catalog actions
before.risk: wire reader restructure (key-order contract), ActionName->Name rename ripples into templates

actions.context: Design context doc (not yet coder handoff): module=>action=>parameter ownership, Create vocabulary (Mint/Load/Populate die), no Handler property, pr reader order contract, site sweep + demolition list

Reply to coder's area-1b note: D-A delete vestigial graph .Errors (errors=run, warnings=build principle), D-B app/warning at root, D-C graph-only. Corrects coder's CallChainRenderer claim (reads Call.Errors, not graph .Errors). Plus summary.md for the session.

Reply to coder's goalcall-one-structure note. Principle: one structure per type, parse at the boundary. Collapse widened with Ingi: Convert dies entirely (parallel ctor protocol beside ICreate), ToGoalCall dies (Default.cs asserts, ingest boundary materializes), CLR-name guards demoted to leak-patches for verified demolition, string arm is name-only by design. Sequencing: land now, tightly scoped, not with recovery pass.

Reply to coder's typed-value-set-reader note, settled with Ingi. Ownership chain: entity door resolves reader, item hands content, kind bridges format, type reader owns structure. No kind.Read(value,target) virtual, no Set edit, no ReadList. goal.call gets explicit reader. STJ attribute purge + Clr-callsite sweep queued. Prerequisite of module-owns-action.

Reply to coder's node-list-values note. Ruling: program structure is context-free, context travels with the ask (rejects both A stamp-at-load and B late-stamp — shared-graph contamination). Context-never-null restated as a use rule, not storage. Two-lifecycle list.@this base (run-born keeps :103 throw; node lists get protected context-free ctor), seven _context-site audit, never-stamp-shared rule with fresh-view precedent, concurrency smoke test.

Consumer trace folded into node-list-values ruling, settled with Ingi: no public typed-element face (typed face internal; only Data value face public), .list escape hatch dies with zero survivors, ~16 loops become graph members (goal wires itself — the twice-written wiring loop collapses) + walk-door migrations (ForEachAction needs single-verb rename), nine signature retypes incl. BuildResponse.Steps/Describe/implicit-operator (former flagged-not-fixed now fixed), construction via node Add, property.list precedent caveat (Clr-per-read is the disease), coder's Elements accessor goes internal.

Completing sweep after Ingi asked if the map was complete (it was not): direct enumeration/indexer sites (Parameter enumeration is shape-stable Data-rows before+after ~14 sites no-change; snapshot-restore/Validate index sites use the INTERNAL typed face), template language boundary (goalFormat/stepForLlm/actionFormal render-diff verification), scope hole flagged for Ingi (goal.Child + action.Modifiers are [Store] sequences neither in nor out — lean: explicitly OUT this pass), ~19 test sites.

Reply to coder's wiring snag: back-ref IS the defect (4th appearance of program/run law); no Wire(), no Walk (ForEachAction deleted); back-ref deletion is its own pass with CONDEMNED bridge; Synthetic stamped by reader now; Before-lifecycle symmetry kills FindCurrentAction; setup walk evaporates (IsSetup at read). Render/analysis + build-validation dispositions + internal-face extent held OPEN pending discussion with Ingi. Not pushed.

#3 settled with Ingi and folded into the wiring-snag answer: birth facts + registry filters (goal.list.Test one-liner mirroring :255; Tag stamped at parse; step.Variable build fact replacing getTypes which dies per its own [Obsolete]; discover's HasSkipTag/ExtractUserTags deleted; debug render via templates). #4 (build-validation iteration + internal-face extent) remains open.

#4 settled and accepted by Ingi: two build moments (fold = constructor scope holding its own references; checking = Validate as third node-owned recursion goal->step->action.list->action with warnings on node.Warning); builder keeps only reaction (FixValidation/abort); internal typed face final extent Add/IndexOf/indexer, Elements dies with the condemned bridge; BuildResponse bridges to recovery. Wiring-snag answer now FULLY settled.

after.status: wiring-snag answer fully settled (back-ref pass queued, Validate trilogy accepted); awaiting push signal
